description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named continuous-integration that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for linux-os and one for windows-os. The linux-os job should run on ubuntu-latest, update APT, install dependencies, check out the repository, pre-configure, configure, and build the project. The windows-os job should run on windows-latest with a matrix of platforms, clone a megasource repository, check out another repository, configure with cmake, install, and upload an artifact.
